'''Greg Keyes''' is the author of three [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|New Jedi Order]] novels as well as the New Jedi Order short story ''[[Emissary of the Void]]''.

He was born in Meridian, Mississippi, to a large, diverse, storytelling family. He received degrees in anthropology from Mississippi State and the University of Georgia before becoming a full-time writer. He lives in Savannah, Georgia.
